variant: Multiple variants available (Surface Mount and Flush Mount)
capacity: Various capacities from 36,000# to 100,000# with track lengths from 26' to 48'

installation_requirements.concrete_requirements: Thickness and PSI strength to be specified by customer
installation_requirements.electrical_connection: Final electrical connection to local/national code is responsibility of electrical contractor
installation_requirements.pneumatic_power: Responsibility of mechanical contractor to final designated point

parts_list.description: WASH BAY KIT (4 LEG LIFT) - Includes: Stainless Steel BASE & STRINGER PLATES, ANCHORS & SPECIAL PAINT
WASH BAY KIT (6 LEG LIFT) - Includes: Stainless Steel BASE & STRINGER PLATES, ANCHORS & SPECIAL PAINT
WASH BAY KIT (8 LEG LIFT) - Includes: Stainless Steel BASE & STRINGER PLATES, ANCHORS & SPECIAL PAINT
WASH BAY KIT (4 LEG LIFT) - Includes: Stainless Steel ANCHORS & SPECIAL PAINT
WASH BAY KIT (6 LEG LIFT) - Includes: Stainless Steel ANCHORS & SPECIAL PAINT
WASH BAY KIT (8 LEG LIFT) - (GROUTING RECOMMENDED)
STEEL WASHER, 1 inch DIA x 3/16 inch THK
ANCHOR BOLT, 3/4 DIA x 5 inch LG (STANDARD)
ANCHOR BOLT, 3/4 DIA x 6 inch LG
ANCHOR BOLT, 3/4 DIA x 5 1/2 LG (Stainless Steel)

certifications: ALI Standard ALCTV - denotes lifts or options that have been tested and certified to ALI Standard ALCTV
notes: Standard location shown for control console - optional locations at customer's request
Additional charges will or may apply for custom console locations
See installation instructions for additional specs
Some option combinations are not available
Specification subject to change without notice
Electrical and pneumatic power for lift to be brought into lift control console
If shimming is in excess of 1/2 inch, it is recommended to use base plates
Additional base plate shims and/or grouting may require longer anchor bolts
Contact Mohawk Resources for current pricing
All lift options checked for purchase must be listed on purchase order as separate line items
